div.p: Group 1 Mapping from http://whonet.org/CodeSystem/antibiotic to WHO ATC

title.value: WHONET Antibiotic Codes to WHO ATC Classification

description.value: Maps WHONET antibiotic codes to WHO ATC (Anatomical Therapeutic Chemical) codes. Derived from the AMR R package (https://github.com/msberends/AMR). Contains 374 WHONET antibiotic codes with ATC mappings.
